## Done checklist
- [ ] Works on iPhone portrait layout
- [ ] Controls are understandable without tutorial text
- [ ] No hardcoded colours or font sizes (use tokens or SwiftUI defaults)
- [ ] Previews render in Xcode canvas
- [ ] PR reviewed and merged
